menuItems.name: Ethiopian Special Tibs
menuItems.description: Sizzling tender meat chunks sautéed with berbere sauce, onions, and fresh rosemary. Served with injera.

menuItems.name: Doro Wat
menuItems.description: Traditional spicy chicken stew with hard-boiled egg, simmered for hours in berbere and niter kibbeh.

menuItems.name: Kitfo
menuItems.description: Minced raw beef seasoned with mitmita and kibe, served with homemade cheese and greens.

menuItems.name: Shiro Wat
menuItems.description: Smooth chickpea and bean stew with berbere and garlic. Perfect vegetarian option.

menuItems.name: Special Burger
menuItems.description: Grass-fed beef patty, caramelized onions, melted cheddar, special sauce, and fresh lettuce.

menuItems.name: Spaghetti Carbonara
menuItems.description: Creamy pasta with crispy pancetta, parmesan cheese, and fresh egg yolk.

menuItems.name: Grilled Salmon
menuItems.description: Fresh Atlantic salmon grilled to perfection, served with seasonal vegetables and lemon butter sauce.

menuItems.name: Fresh Spring Rolls
menuItems.description: Crispy rice paper rolls filled with fresh vegetables and glass noodles, served with sweet chili dip.

menuItems.name: Sambusa
menuItems.description: Crispy pastry filled with spiced lentils or minced meat. Ethiopian favorite.

menuItems.name: Garlic Bread
menuItems.description: Toasted baguette with garlic butter and herbs.

menuItems.name: Traditional Coffee Ceremony
menuItems.description: Authentic Ethiopian coffee experience with roasted beans, incense, and traditional popcorn.

menuItems.name: Macchiato
menuItems.description: Traditional Ethiopian macchiato with a perfect balance of espresso and milk.

menuItems.name: Latte
menuItems.description: Smooth espresso with steamed milk and a light layer of foam. Art on request.

menuItems.name: Cappuccino
menuItems.description: Classic Italian cappuccino with rich espresso, steamed milk, and foam.

menuItems.name: Ethiopian Sunset Mocktail
menuItems.description: Refreshing blend of mango, passion fruit, and a hint of ginger. A taste of Ethiopia in every sip.

menuItems.name: Mint Lemonade
menuItems.description: Freshly squeezed lemons, fresh mint, and a touch of honey.

menuItems.name: Tropical Breeze
menuItems.description: Pineapple, coconut, and orange blend. Taste the tropics.

menuItems.name: Honeycomb Cheesecake
menuItems.description: Creamy New York cheesecake topped with Ethiopian honeycomb.

menuItems.name: Baklava
menuItems.description: Layers of flaky phyllo dough, chopped nuts, and honey syrup.

menuItems.name: Chocolate Lava Cake
menuItems.description: Warm chocolate cake with a molten center, served with vanilla ice cream.
